hero.title: Turn Your Photos Into
hero.description: Upload a photo and a reference video, then let AI create a lively animated clip in minutes.

step1.title: Upload Your Files
step1.desc: Choose a clear portrait photo and a reference video.

step2.title: AI Processing

step3.desc: Get your finished animated video when generation is complete.

examples.title: See the Magic

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay per generation, no subscription required

items.q: How long does it take to generate a video?
items.a: Most videos are completed in about 10 to 15 minutes.

items.q: What kind of photo works best?
items.a: Clear portrait photos with the subject visible from head to waist work best.

items.q: Can I use the generated video commercially?
items.a: Yes. Generated videos can be used for both personal and commercial projects.
If the task fails, the credit should be refunded automatically.
Single credits expire after 30 days and 10-pack credits expire after 90 days.
